description_long: This house complex features multiple interconnected residential structures with steep gabled roofs and white facades accented by dark roofing. The property includes a spacious, landscaped yard with several mature trees, a patio area, and a detached outbuilding or garage. The main buildings are arranged in an L-shaped configuration, with prominent rooflines and a mix of large and small windows distributed across the facades. The front of the house is defined by a central entryway, flanked by symmetrical windows and a small porch area. The rear of the property opens onto a green lawn with pathways and outdoor seating, providing ample space for recreation and relaxation. The overall design blends traditional residential elements with a modern, clean aesthetic.
description: A multi-structure residential house with steep gabled roofs, white walls, and a landscaped yard featuring mature trees and a detached outbuilding. The design combines traditional and modern elements with symmetrical windows and a central entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, symmetrical windows, and the landscaped yard with trees and a detached outbuilding in the foreground.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the L-shaped configuration, the patio area, and the depth of the property with visible trees and lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facades, multiple rooflines, and the driveway or access path leading to the outbuilding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the extended lawn, pathways, and the arrangement of trees and outdoor spaces.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with a small porch, steps, and symmetrical flanking windows
